title: Device Home Screen - End-of-Life Support After End Life Date
scenario: End-of-Life device past its End Life Date shows green connection ring and red "i" icon, with pop-up message "Support for this device is no longer available."
steps: 1. Ensure the device has passed its End Life Date and is no longer supported.
2. Observe the home screen for the device.
3. Check for a green connection status ring on the device.
4. Check for a red 'i' icon on the device.
6. Observe the pop-up message that appears.
expected: The home screen shows a green connection status ring and a red "i" icon. Tapping the "i" icon displays a pop-up message: "Support for this device is no longer available." Tapping outside the pop-up closes it.
